goal: Transform JARVIS read-only /api/jarvis/ask from terse status responses into an executive assistant that gives a structured morning/overnight briefing (greeting, system health, Strategy Factory status, trading research status, warnings/attention, recommended next action) plus conversational follow-ups, while preserving every read-only and trading-safety rule.

classifier.change: Added SAFE_INFO regex patterns for executive-briefing intents and follow-ups. Forbidden patterns still matched FIRST and unchanged.

answer_layer.executive_briefing: Replaced the prior one-line morning-briefing branch with a structured executive briefing: greeting (Good morning Mahmoud) -> system health (system_core + commander_snapshot) -> Strategy Factory status (factory_status report_count + latest decision, framed dry-run/research-only) -> trading research status (candidate_registry candidate_count + 'No live or paper trades were executed') -> warnings/attention (commander_snapshot.warnings) -> recommended next action (recommended_next_actions[0]).
followups_added: what needs attention / attention (lists warnings + next action)
what is the next step / focus on / what should we focus / what to focus (recommended focus)
answer_layer.explain_warning: SAFE_EXPLAIN branch now answers 'explain the warning' with a read-only explanation listing the actual open commander warnings.
reads_only: api_jarvis_status aggregate (commander_snapshot, system_core, factory_status, candidate_registry, trading_detail, recommended_next_actions)

implementation.template_note: Voice + conversation mode already post to /api/jarvis/ask, so they inherit the improved briefing with no template edit.

test_results.invocation_note: Run from tests/ with PYTHONPATH=.. and --noconftest to avoid a pre-existing corrupt repo-root directory ('hydra ' = private-use char + trailing space) that breaks pytest root enumeration; unrelated to this change.

commit_note: Awaiting approval per bundle commit policy.
